overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character traverses from an enclosed snowy slope to an open ridge revealing a vast mountain vista under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed snowy mountainside with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through deep snow with armor visible

entered.detail: snow-covered ground with visible footprints and texture
dark rocks scattered across the snowy slope
snow-covered hills blocking the distant horizon
dark overcast night sky with minimal star visibility

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate snowy mountain landscape at night. The terrain is enclosed by nearby hills, with scattered boulders visible on the sides. The lighting is dim and the sky appears overcast and dark.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with panoramic vista of distant peaks

events.description: character reaches the ridge crest revealing expansive view of distant mountain range and valley below

agents.ego_description: walking along the mountain ridge with the vast landscape visible to the right side

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks stretching across the horizon
deep shadowed valley visible between the ridges
clear night sky with visible stars and cosmic dust

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open mountain ridge, revealing a breathtaking vista of distant snow-capped peaks and a deep valley below. The sky clears to show stars, and the terrain opens up dramatically compared to the enclosed slope.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, enclosed mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast, starry alpine vista. It begins with the character walking through a dim, overcast landscape where the terrain is tightly hemmed in by nearby hills and scattered boulders. As the character advances, the restrictive slopes give way to an open mountain ridge, causing the environment to expand dramatically. The scene then shifts from the oppressive darkness of the valley to a breathtaking panorama of distant snow-capped peaks and a deep gorge below. Finally, the overcast sky clears completely to reveal a brilliant canopy of stars over the wide mountain horizon.
